title: No proof retailer sued Biden for dropping out | Fact check
shortDescription: There is no credible evidence of such a lawsuit. The image was digitally created and does not show authentic news coverage.

title: Potential Trump assassination attempt by Iran foiled as plotter charged
shortDescription: A Pakistani national tied to Iran was charged by the Justice Department with murder for hire in a plot to assassinate U.S. officials.

title: Indicted Trump attorney Jenna Ellis to help Arizona prosecutors
shortDescription: AG Kris Mayes’ office will drop the charges against Jenna Ellis, who “shall testify completely and truthfully at any time and any place requested."

title: Baseless claim that Trump shooter had offshore accounts | Fact check
shortDescription: The FBI said it hasn't found evidence that Crooks owned overseas bank accounts. The post doesn't provide any proof to back up its claim.

title: 'Boring' vs 'weird': How Republicans are trying to define Tim Walz
shortDescription: Harris selected Walz, the governor of Minnesota, as her running mate Tuesday. Trump allies were quick to attack his record.
